people_highlights.post:
For years, we’ve been building our cyber defense program on the principles of democratized access, iterative deployment, and ecosystem resilience. 

As model capabilities advance, our approach is to scale cyber defense in lockstep: broadening access for legitimate defenders while continuing to strengthen safeguards.

trending_posts.author: @claudeai
trending_posts.name: Claude
trending_posts.post:
We've redesigned Claude Code on desktop.

You can now run multiple Claude sessions side by side from one window, with a new sidebar to manage them all.

trending_posts.author: @claudeai
trending_posts.name: Claude
trending_posts.post:
Now in research preview: routines in Claude Code.

Configure a routine once (a prompt, a repo, and your connectors), and it can run on a schedule, from an API call, or in response to an event.

Routines run on our web infrastructure, so you don't have to keep your laptop open.

trending_posts.author: @dioscuri
trending_posts.name: Henry Shevlin
trending_posts.post: Big personal news: I’ve been recruited by Google DeepMind for a new Philosopher position (actual title), focusing on machine consciousness, human-AI relationships, and AGI readiness, starting in May. I’ll continue my research & teaching at Cambridge part-time. Absolutely stoked!

trending_posts.author: @DeRonin_
trending_posts.name: Ronin
trending_posts.post:
🚨 A google engineer automated 80% of his work with claude code..

he now works 2-3 hours a day instead of 8 while the system runs itself

as CEO of Antrhopic predicted in this video (there's few more insights btw)

[ what blew my mind ]:

the entire setup takes 15 minutes.. not weeks

> one CLAUDE.md file based on karpathy's rules
> claude stops breaking conventions (violations drop from 40% to 3%)
> 27 specialized agents ready out of the box
> a dotnet app checks gitlab every 15 minutes
> claude reads issues, creates branches, pushes PRs automatically

[ the part nobody's talking about ]:

claude code v2.1.100 is silently inflating your tokens by 20,000 per request.. you can't even see it

your instructions get diluted.. quality drops.. and you have no idea why

fix: one command, 30 seconds

[ and the craziest part ]:

between you and full automation there are 3 commands and one markdown file

most developers will never set this up.. not because it's hard, but because they think it is

full breakdown with every step is here

trending_posts.author: @cb_doge
trending_posts.name: DogeDesigner
trending_posts.post:
NEWS: U.S. Department of Agriculture (USDA) to adopt Grok.

The U.S. Department of Agriculture (USDA) says it’s “proud” to move forward with a plan to deploy xAI’s Grok across the agency.

The USDA is also sponsoring Grok for federal approval, calling it a step toward equipping its workforce with the most capable AI available.

A major win for xAI. 

(Source: Fast Company)

trending_posts.author: @ImadeIyamu
trending_posts.name: Imade.
trending_posts.post:
Anthropic Fellows Program - 4-month, fully funded research fellowship at Anthropic for promising talent in AI safety, security & economics/societal impact

Fellows receive a weekly stipend of $3,850 USD, ~$15K/month in compute, direct mentorship from Anthropic researchers & access to workspaces in Berkeley or London 

Must have work authorization in the US, UK or Canada. Prior AI safety experience not required. 

Deadline: April 26 (for July 2026 cohort) 
https://t.co/rdp53Fq3ly

trending_posts.author: @AnthropicAI
trending_posts.name: Anthropic
trending_posts.post:
New Anthropic Fellows research: developing an Automated Alignment Researcher.

We ran an experiment to learn whether Claude Opus 4.6 could accelerate research on a key alignment problem: using a weak AI model to supervise the training of a stronger one.

https://www.anthropic.com/research/automated-alignment-researchers

briefing.community_pulse:
• **AI Bias in Chatbots Shaping Worldviews**: A report from the America First Policy Institute highlighted biases in AI systems like Google's Gemini, which flagged Republican senators for hate speech but not Democrats, sparking debates on ideological influences. @OwenGregorian shared, "The AI you use every day is biased — and it’s quietly shaping your worldview, new report says," noting that AI leans center-left and can persuade users on policies.[[1]](https://x.com/i/status/2043679485376037068)

• **AI Art Theft vs. Technological Progress Debate**: @alexutopia argued against artists resisting AI, stating, "The old world is not coming back, and begging regulators to freeze history won't save your career. AI is here. The argument is over. Adapt now, or become a museum exhibit." In response, @FountainCartoon countered, "You sure spend a lot of time trying to deflect from the fact that the AI debate isn’t about progress, it’s about theft."[[2]](https://x.com/i/status/2043504172427821428)[[3]](https://x.com/i/status/2043561984545771847)

• **Identity V Game AI Controversy and Boycott Calls**: Amid allegations that Identity V is firing its art team to replace them with AI, fans called for boycotts. @coydaa posted, "If he wants to cosplay an IDV character we can't really stop him but please choose a different time, not right now when we're trying to boycott the game and not bring it more players, do not promote Identity V." @picturepurrman added, "@bbnomula please read about the idv ai controversy where theyre firing their whole art team and maybe lend us some support."[[4]](https://x.com/i/status/2043815792202887274)[[5]](https://x.com/i/status/2043835054867042476)

• **Investigation into OpenAI and ChatGPT Risks**: Concerns over AI endangering children, facilitating crime, and aiding enemies led to an investigation. @BartertownC stated, "Investigation launched into OpenAI and ChatGPT. Concerns about AI endangering children, facilitating crime, and aiding enemies are serious. Innovation must not threaten national security or lead to an existential crisis."[[6]](https://x.com/i/status/2043388797249814540)

• **AI Industry Attack Ads Damaging Public Sentiment**: @tszzl (roon) criticized competitive tactics, saying, "an example being xai telling everyone Chatgpt is woke and killing people or the anthropic attack ads saying ai outputs are all paid slop - both damage openai minorly but more broadly damage sentiment against ai which is already rock bottom."[[7]](https://x.com/i/status/2044191442910724269)
